changeSet.author: liferadar
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO saas_subscription ( service_name, item_type, description, monthly_cost, currency, annual_cost, bill_date, due_date, paid_date, subscription_date, renewal_date, billing_cycle, status, auto_renewal, renewal_reminder, receipt_url, payment_method, is_recurring, provider_url, account_email, account_username, notes, is_shared, created_date, last_modified_date, owner_id ) SELECT b.description, 'BILL', NULL, b.amount, COALESCE(eu.currency, 'USD'), b.amount, b.bill_date, b.due_date, b.paid_date, COALESCE(b.bill_date, CURRENT_DATE), b.due_date, 'MONTHLY', b.status, FALSE, NULL, b.receipt_url, b.payment_method, COALESCE(b.is_recurring, FALSE), NULL, NULL, NULL, b.notes, FALSE, b.created_date, b.last_modified_date, b.owner_id FROM bill b LEFT JOIN extended_user eu ON eu.id = b.owner_id;
